title: 怎么看待戴琪可能宣布降低PRC的关税？
meta_description: 怎么看待戴琪可能宣布降低PRC的关税？ - From USTR: "On Monday, October 4 at 10:00 AM, United States Trade Representative Katherine Tai will deliver a speech about ...
meta_keywords: 看待,戴琪,可能,宣布,降低,prc,关税
contents:
From USTR: "On Monday, October 4 at 10:00 AM, United States Trade Representative Katherine Tai will deliver a speech about the Biden-Harris Administration’s approach to the bilateral trade relationship with China." The speech will be at CSIS.

https://twitter.com/tradereporter/status/1443685109157220353

discussions.content: 这消息并没有提降税吧……
不可能！因为拜登更加反共！孟晚舟回国让美国抓住华为尾巴！拜登必胜！（迫）
